tasks.description: Create KumoTranslation type interface in src/localize/types.ts
steps: File exists at packages/kumo/src/localize/types.ts
KumoTranslation interface exported with $code, $name, $dir fields

All ~40 translation keys present in kebab-case: close, copy, copied, copy-to-clipboard, copied-to-clipboard, loading, no-results-found, optional, more-information, first-page, previous-page, next-page, last-page, page-number, page-size, per-page, showing-range, sensitive-value, click-to-reveal, hide-value, reveal-value, value-masked, value-hidden, click-or-press-enter-to-reveal, previous-month, next-month, edit-month-and-year, reset-dates, timezone, selected-as-start-date, selected-as-end-date, within-selected-range, resize-column, click-to-copy, copy-command, cloudflare-logo, delete-resource, delete-action-cannot-be-undone, type-to-confirm, confirm-deletion-aria-label, copy-resource-name-to-clipboard, cancel, delete-resource-type

Parameterized keys (showing-range, timezone, selected-as-start-date, selected-as-end-date, within-selected-range, delete-resource, delete-action-cannot-be-undone, type-to-confirm, confirm-deletion-aria-label, copy-resource-name-to-clipboard, delete-resource-type) typed as functions returning string
Simple keys typed as string
$dir typed as 'ltr' | 'rtl' union
pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.description: Create translation registry with registerTranslation() and resolution logic in src/localize/registry.ts
steps: File exists at packages/kumo/src/localize/registry.ts
registerTranslation() accepts variadic KumoTranslation args and stores in a Map keyed by $code
getTranslation(lang) resolves: exact match (zh-CN) -> language prefix (zh) -> first registered (en)
First translation registered becomes the fallback
Multiple calls to registerTranslation() merge (don't replace) the registry
pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.description: Create useSyncExternalStore-based hook for <html lang> reactivity in src/localize/use-locale.ts
steps: File exists at packages/kumo/src/localize/use-locale.ts
Uses useSyncExternalStore to subscribe to document.documentElement.lang changes
MutationObserver created lazily on first subscription (not at module load)
Provides server snapshot returning 'en' for SSR
Falls back to navigator.language when <html lang> is empty
Falls back to 'en' when both are unavailable
pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.description: Create KumoLocaleProvider context and useLocalize() hook in src/localize/index.ts
steps: KumoLocaleProvider component accepts optional locale prop and children
KumoLocaleProvider overrides <html lang> detection for its subtree via React context
useLocalize() returns object with term(), date(), number(), lang(), dir()
term() is type-safe: term('close') returns string, term('showing-range', 1, 10, 100) requires args
date() delegates to Intl.DateTimeFormat with resolved locale
number() delegates to Intl.NumberFormat with resolved locale
lang() returns resolved BCP 47 code
dir() returns $dir from resolved translation
Locale resolution order: KumoLocaleProvider > <html lang> > navigator.language > 'en'
pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.description: Create DirectionProvider context and useDirection() hook in src/localize/direction.ts
steps: File exists at packages/kumo/src/localize/direction.ts
DirectionProvider component accepts required direction prop ('ltr' | 'rtl') and children
useDirection() returns 'ltr' when no DirectionProvider is present
useDirection() returns the direction prop value when wrapped in DirectionProvider
Nested DirectionProviders: innermost wins
pnpm typecheck passes
